title: B7.1.1.1 Misstep: Surface Value Copy
misconception_statement: Chooses an answer because it repeats a visible number, keyword, or shape of the question without completing the required mathematical step.
correction_hint: Pause to identify what is being asked, list the given values, then perform the needed operation before comparing options.

title: B7.1.1.1 Misstep: Wrong Operation Or Formula
misconception_statement: Uses a related operation, inverse operation, or familiar formula in the wrong context.
correction_hint: Match the operation or formula to the condition in the stem before substituting values.

title: B7.1.1.2 Misstep: Surface Value Copy
misconception_statement: Chooses an answer because it repeats a visible number, keyword, or shape of the question without completing the required mathematical step.
correction_hint: Pause to identify what is being asked, list the given values, then perform the needed operation before comparing options.

title: B7.1.1.2 Misstep: Wrong Operation Or Formula
misconception_statement: Uses a related operation, inverse operation, or familiar formula in the wrong context.
correction_hint: Match the operation or formula to the condition in the stem before substituting values.

title: B7.1.1.2 Misstep: Notation Or Representation Misread
misconception_statement: Misreads notation, labels, units, signs, powers, coordinates, fractions, or graph information.
correction_hint: Translate the notation into words and check units, signs, labels, and order before calculating.

title: B7.1.2.1 Misstep: Surface Value Copy
misconception_statement: Chooses an answer because it repeats a visible number, keyword, or shape of the question without completing the required mathematical step.
